name: Paladin
abilities:
The wall — 🛡6 and always blocks 2 hits (+2🛡). Heavy armour makes him slow to Flee. Reach 1: a foe striking from beyond his reach takes no blow back, so keep him in the front line.

2☼: Give an ally +1 to their next roll (lose 1 life).
3☼: Draw an extra card.
End your turn beside an ally to regain 4 life.
objectiveAbilities:
7◆: Allies 1 space away get +1 to their rolls.

5◆ (6☼): Teleport next to any living ally (lose 2 life).

name: Barbarian
abilities:
Raw power — ⚔7, reach 1. A pure melee bruiser: he hits hardest toe-to-toe, but an enemy striking from beyond his reach takes no counter, so a ranged foe can wear him down. Heavy — slow to Flee.

4☼: On your next move, destroy every minion you end adjacent to along the way.
objectiveAbilities: 5◆ (3☼): Haul every minion 6+ spaces away next to you and fight them (spend extra ☼ to reach farther).

name: Hunter
abilities:
Marksman — reach 2, so he strikes minions that can't strike back.

3☼: Summon your pet (🐾 button) — a hero-side piece (⚔2 / 🛡2 / ❤6). 2☼: your pet takes an action. The pet shares your movement rolls (not bonus dice), flies over obstacles (not walls), and is DESTROYED if it ever fights the monster itself.

name: Scout
abilities:
Nimble — the party's escape artist: he Flees on 1 fewer shield than anyone else.

1☼: +2 to your movement roll.
5֍: spend a movement roll as an action.
objectiveAbilities: 5◆ (4☼): Dash to any wall in line of sight, then end your turn.

name: Wizard
abilities:
Caster — strikes at reach 2 but frail (⚔3 / 🛡2 / ❤8). Wins through spell cards.

2☼: Reroll any of your dice this turn.
4☼: Draw an extra card.
You may discard a card to draw another.
objectiveAbilities:
3◇: Relocate 1 door.
5◇: Relocate 1 door.

5◆ (6☼): Trade places with any object on the board.

name: Enchantress
abilities:
Controller — bends the board rather than trading blows (⚔3 / 🛡2). Win with utility.

4☼: Walk through a wall.
5☼: Move a monster or an ally 1 space.
You may discard a card to draw another.
objectiveAbilities:
4◆ (6☼): Play any ally's card on any hero.
5◆ (7☼): Use an action anywhere on the board.

name: Thief
abilities:
Assassin — ⚔7 and slips away easily (Flees on 1 fewer shield), but fragile (🛡2 / ❤10). Reach 1: devastating up close. Moves diagonally (GREEN).

1☼ + 2֍: Use an action 2 spaces away.
5☼: Use an ally hero's card.
objectiveAbilities: 5◆ (6☼): Cannot be targeted or seen until your next turn.

name: Ranger
abilities:
Sharpshooter — reach 3, and +2 attack dice when striking from 2+ spaces away. Staying back keeps him safe: a target he out-reaches can't strike back. Moves diagonally (GREEN).

2☼: Deal 4 damage to a minion within reach.
3☼ + 4֍: Move an objective 1 space.
objectiveAbilities: 5◆ (4☼): Reroll any of your movement dice.

name: Druid
abilities:
Shapeshifter — 3☼: Transform (persists until you change again; may be re-cast several times a turn). 4☼: Transform an ally for this turn. Your sheet shows the active form's roll bonuses.

BEAR: +2⚔ / +2🛡 (bruiser).
TURTLE: +4🛡 (shell).
CHEETAH: -2🛡, +2 to movement rolls (fast, fragile).
DEER: -2🛡; for 1☼ restore 4 life to any hero (fragile healer).

name: Cleric
abilities:
Blessed — 🛡6 and always blocks 2 hits (+2🛡): very hard to put down, though heavy and slow to Flee.

4☼: Restore 6 life to any living hero.
12☼: Revive any hero to half health (ends both heroes' turns).
Both your dice count as actions OR movement.
objectiveAbilities: 5◆ (3☼): Give an ally +2 to a roll (you lose 2 life).
